segments.text: This office building costed them $5 billion. Five things about Apple Park that will blow your mind. First, the
entire building has no air conditioning most of the time. It just breathes like a living organism using natural ventilation through those curved glass panels.
those curved glass panels you just saw are the largest curved glass panels ever created in human history. Each panel is
45 ft tall and had to be custom made in Germany. But wait for the innovation promax. Third, this entire building
floats on more than 500 underground giant steel sauces. So even when a strong earthquake comes, the whole structure can float multiple feats in any direction.
And now the beautiful glass dome you see, it's hiding a massive secret theater completely underground where Apple launches all of their products you
might see in the WWDC. This dome itself is the largest structure in the world which is only supported by glass. This
is amazing, but I've saved the weird one as a surprise.
In the cafeteria, they also designed and patented their own circular pizza boxes because they thought regular ones made the crust soggy. Subscribe for more.
